Step 7: ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🪼) = (🪵 ⊕ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 5: inv((🧊 ⊗ 🧿)) = inv(((🧊 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🧊))    [by definition of ⊗]

Step 7: inv((🧿 ⊕ 🧊)) = inv(🧿)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🧿) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

To simplify the expression \(((\text{inv}(🫧) \otimes \text{inv}(🧲)) \otimes 🫧)\), we follow these steps:

1. Apply the inverse transformation to the symbols:
   - \(\text{inv}(🫧) = 🧲\)
   - \(\text{inv}(🧲) = 🫧\)

2. Substitute these values into the expression:
   - \(((🧲 \otimes 🫧) \otimes 🫧)\)

3. Apply the definition of the \(\otimes\) operation:
   - \(x \otimes y = (x \oplus x) \oplus y\)
   - Therefore, \(🧲 \otimes 🫧 = (🧲 \oplus 🧲) \oplus 🫧\)

4. Use the \(\oplus\) table to simplify \(🧲 \oplus 🧲\):
   - From the table, \(🧲 \oplus 🧲 = 🪻\)

5. Substitute back into the expression:
   - \((🪻 \oplus 🫧)\)

6. Use the \(\oplus\) table to simplify \(🪻 \oplus 🫧\):
   - From the table, \(🪻 \oplus 🫧 = 🪻\)

Thus, the expression simplifies to:

\[
((\text{inv}(🫧) \otimes \text{inv}(🧲)) \otimes 🫧) = 🪻
\]

Final Output: 🪻

Start: ((inv(🪣) ⊗ (🌵 ⊕ 🌵)) ⊗ inv(🧲))

Step 1: ((inv(🪣) ⊗ (🌵 ⊕ 🌵)) ⊗ inv(🧲)) = ((🧲 ⊗ (🌵 ⊕ 🌵)) ⊗ inv(🧲))    [by inv]
Step 2: ((🧲 ⊗ (🌵 ⊕ 🌵)) ⊗ inv(🧲)) = ((🧲 ⊗ 🧄) ⊗ inv(🧲))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 3: ((🧲 ⊗ 🧄) ⊗ inv(🧲)) = (inv((🧲 ⊕ 🧄)) ⊗ inv(🧲))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 4: (inv((🧲 ⊕ 🧄)) ⊗ inv(🧲)) = (inv(🌵) ⊗ inv(🧲))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (inv(🌵) ⊗ inv(🧲)) = (🪣 ⊗ 🧄)    [by inv]
Step 6: (🪣 ⊗ 🧄) = inv(🪣 ⊕ 🧄)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: inv(🪣 ⊕ 🧄) = inv(🌵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🌵) = 🪣    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪣

Step 6: (🦩 ⊛ (inv(🪭) ⊕ inv(🧁))) = (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🦩 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🦩 ⊛ 🪭)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🦩 ⊛ 🪭) = inv(🦩 ⊗ 🪭)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🦩 ⊗ 🪭) = inv(🧁)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(🧁) = 🪨    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪨

Step 6: (🧶 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ (🧄 ⊛ 🪻))) = (🧶 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ inv(🧄 ⊕ 🪻)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🧶 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ inv(🧄 ⊕ 🪻))) = (🧶 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ inv(🪨)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🧶 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ inv(🪨))) = (🧶 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🪻))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🧶 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🪻)) = (🧶 ⊕ 🧿)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (🧶 ⊕ 🧿) = 🪻    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪻

Step 6: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ (🥟 ⊛ 🪩))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊗ 🪩)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊗ 🪩))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ inv(🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ 🪩))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🥟 ⊕ (🪺 ⊕ 🪩)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🫧)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (🥟 ⊕ 🫧) = 🪩    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪩

Step 6: (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ inv(🫐))) = (🧶 ⊛ 🪈)    [by ⊗ table and inv]
Step 7: (🧶 ⊛ 🪈) = inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈) = inv(🪈)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: inv(🪈) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 5: (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁))) = (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ 🫧))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🐙 ⊕ 🫧))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🐙 ⊕ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧁))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧁)) = (🧁 ⊗ 🐙)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🧁 ⊗ 🐙) = 🐙    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🐙

Step 6: (🪵 ⊛ (inv(🪨) ⊗ 🪬)) = inv(🪵 ⊗ (inv(🪨) ⊗ 🪬))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: inv(🪵 ⊗ (inv(🪨) ⊗ 🪬)) = inv(🪵 ⊗ (🪵 ⊗ 🪬))    [by inv]
Step 8: inv(🪵 ⊗ (🪵 ⊗ 🪬)) = inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪨)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: inv(🪵 ⊗ 🪨) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(🪵) = 🪺

Step 9: (🪤 ⊛ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (🪤 ⊗ 🪭))    [by simplifying inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) to 🪤]
Step 10: (🪤 ⊛ (🪤 ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ 🫑)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (🪤 ⊛ 🫑) = inv(🪤 ⊕ 🫑)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 12: inv(🪤 ⊕ 🫑) = inv(🦎)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: inv(🦎) = 🫑    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 8: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot((🐌 ⊗ 🧊)))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌)))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑)))    [by rot definition]
Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(🐌))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 11: (🪆 ⊗ rot(🐌)) = (🪆 ⊗ 🪸)    [by rot definition]
Step 12: (🪆 ⊗ 🪸) = 🫑    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 8: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊞ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🧿)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 9: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🧿))) = inv(rot(🪈))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 10: inv(rot(🪈)) = inv(🫐)    [by rot]
Step 11: inv(🫐) = 🧿    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧿

Step 9: ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ rot(🪵))) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by rot]
Step 10: ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 11: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪸)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪸)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ 🫐) ⊞ 🫐)    [by inv]
Step 13: ((🥟 ⊕ 🫐) ⊞ 🫐) = (🪸 ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: (🪸 ⊞ 🫐) = inv(🪸 ⊕ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪸 ⊕ 🫐) = inv(🪭)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🪭) = 🪬    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪬

Step 8: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(🪻 ⊕ inv(🦎)))    [by ⊛ definition and ⊕ table]
Step 10: (🦎 ⊗ rot(🪻 ⊕ inv(🦎))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(🪻 ⊕ 🪻))    [by inv]
Step 11: (🦎 ⊗ rot(🪻 ⊕ 🪻)) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(🦎))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: (🦎 ⊗ rot(🦎)) = (🦎 ⊗ 🌵)    [by rot]
Step 13: (🦎 ⊗ 🌵) = 🪈    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪈

Step 9: (🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ (🪸 ⊞ (🪆 ⊗ 🥟)))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ (🪸 ⊞ 🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: (🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ (🪸 ⊞ 🥟))) = (🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 11: (🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: (🥟 ⊕ 🫐) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 3: ((🥟 ⊕ 🐌) ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌)) = (🧿 ⊕ (🧿 ⊕ 🐌))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ 🪤) = 🫑    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 3: (🥟 ⊕ (🦔 ⊕ 🦔)) = (🥟 ⊕ 🦔)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 4: (🥟 ⊕ 🦔) = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪈

Step 5: (🧿 ⊗ inv(🫧)) = (🧿 ⊗ 🪤)    [by inv]
Step 6: (🧿 ⊗ 🪤) = ((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🪤)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: ((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ 🪤) = (🪨 ⊕ 🪤)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🪨 ⊕ 🪤) = 🫧    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🫧

Step 6: inv(((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🧄)) = inv((🪣 ⊕ 🧄))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv((🪣 ⊕ 🧄)) = inv(🪆)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🪆) = 🪼    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪼

Start: (inv((🪺 ⊗ 🫑)) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙)))

Step 1: (inv((🪺 ⊗ 🫑)) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (inv(inv((🪺 ⊕ 🫑))) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙)))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 2: (inv(inv((🪺 ⊕ 🫑))) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (inv(inv(🫑)) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 3: (inv(inv(🫑)) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙)))    [by inv]
Step 4: (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv((🫑 ⊕ 🐙))) = (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv(🐙))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (inv(🪺) ⊕ inv(🐙)) = (🍄 ⊕ 🪺)    [by inv]
Step 6: (🍄 ⊕ 🪺) = 🍄    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🍄

Step 5: inv((🧲 ⊗ 🪆)) = inv(((🧲 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🧲))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(((🧲 ⊕ 🪆) ⊕ 🧲)) = inv(🌵 ⊕ 🧲)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv(🌵 ⊕ 🧲) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: inv(🪨) = 🪆    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪆

Step 5: inv((🪺 ⊗ 🪤)) = inv(inv(🪺 ⊕ 🪤))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: inv(inv(🪺 ⊕ 🪤)) = inv(inv(🧄))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: inv(inv(🧄)) = inv(🪤)    [by inv]
Step 8: inv(🪤) = 🫐    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫐

Step 5: (🍄 ⊕ (🪆 ⊗ inv(🪵))) = (🍄 ⊕ (🪆 ⊗ 🪆))    [by inv]
Step 6: (🍄 ⊕ (🪆 ⊗ 🪆)) = (🍄 ⊕ inv(🪆 ⊕ 🪆))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: (🍄 ⊕ inv(🪆 ⊕ 🪆)) = (🍄 ⊕ inv(🪵))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🍄 ⊕ inv(🪵)) = (🍄 ⊕ 🪆)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🍄 ⊕ 🪆) = 🍄    [by ⊕ table]

Step 7: (🐌 ⊗ (🧊 ⊕ 🪨)) = (🐌 ⊗ 🫑)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🐌 ⊗ 🫑) = inv(🐌 ⊕ 🫑)    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 9: inv(🐌 ⊕ 🫑) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🪨) = 🫑    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 4: ((🦔 ⊗ (🦔 ⊕ 🫑)) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: ((🦔 ⊗ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (inv(🦔 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 6: (inv(🦔 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (inv(🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (inv(🪼) ⊕ inv(🪼)) = (🦔 ⊕ 🦔)    [by inv]
Step 8: (🦔 ⊕ 🦔) = 🪸    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 4: (🪸 ⊕ (🪸 ⊕ (🧄 ⊕ 🪼))) = (🪸 ⊕ (🪸 ⊕ 🪼))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 5: (🪸 ⊕ (🪸 ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪸 ⊕ 🪼)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🪸 ⊕ 🪼) = 🪼    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Step 5: ((🪩 ⊕ 🪼) ⊗ 🪩) = (🫑 ⊗ 🪩)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🫑 ⊗ 🪩) = (🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🪩    [by definition of ⊗]
Step 7: (🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🪩 = 🦩 ⊕ 🪩    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: 🦩 ⊕ 🪩 = 🪼    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Step 4: (inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(inv(🥟))) = (inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(🐌))    [by inv(🥟) = 🐌]
Step 5: (inv(🌵) ⊕ inv(🐌)) = (inv(🌵) ⊕ 🌵)    [by inv(🐌) = 🌵]
Step 6: (inv(🌵) ⊕ 🌵) = (🥟 ⊕ 🌵)    [by inv(🌵) = 🥟]
Step 7: (🥟 ⊕ 🌵) = 🥟    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🥟

Step 6: (🪻 ⊛ ((🪩 ⊗ 🧶) ⊕ inv(🪬))) = ((🪻 ⊗ 🪻) ⊗ ((🪩 ⊗ 🧶) ⊕ inv(🪬)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: ((🪻 ⊗ 🪻) ⊗ ((🪩 ⊗ 🧶) ⊕ inv(🪬))) = (🪩 ⊗ ((🪩 ⊗ 🧶) ⊕ inv(🪬)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🪩 ⊗ ((🪩 ⊗ 🧶) ⊕ inv(🪬))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪼 ⊕ inv(🪬)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪩 ⊗ (🪼 ⊕ inv(🪬))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪼 ⊕ 🪼))    [by inv transformation]
Step 10: (🪩 ⊗ (🪼 ⊕ 🪼)) = (🪩 ⊗ 🧶)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: (🪩 ⊗ 🧶) = 🪼    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Step 6: (🪻 ⊛ ((🪵 ⊕ 🪵) ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 7: (🪻 ⊛ (🪈 ⊕ 🐙)) = (🪻 ⊛ 🪻)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🪻 ⊛ 🪻) = inv(🪻 ⊕ 🪻)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🪻 ⊕ 🪻) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🪵) = 🪻    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪻

Step 6: (🐌 ⊛ (🪸 ⊛ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🐌))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🐌)) = (🐌 ⊛ 🦎)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🐌 ⊛ 🦎) = ((🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🦎)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: ((🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🦎) = (🪵 ⊗ 🦎)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊗ 🦎) = 🪵    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪵

Step 6: (🧄 ⊛ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = inv(🧄 ⊕ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: inv(🧄 ⊕ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧊)    [by ⊗ table and inv]
Step 8: inv(🧄 ⊕ 🧊) = inv(🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 9: inv(🧊) = 🪨    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪨

Step 6: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ inv(🪼))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🫧))    [by inv table]
Step 7: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪣 ⊗ 🫧))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪣 ⊗ 🫧)) = (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪼))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪼)) = (🪩 ⊗ 🫧)    [by inv table]
Step 10: (🪩 ⊗ 🫧) = 🪼    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪼

Step 9: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ 🐙)))    [by rot table]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🪵))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🪵)) = (🪵 ⊞ 🥟)    [by rot table]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🥟) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🥟)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🥟) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🪵) = 🧁    [by inv table]

Final Output: 🧁
